top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE s.height_cm > (
    SELECT AVG(height_cm) * 0.8
    FROM superhero
);

SELECT DISTINCT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE s.height_cm > (
    SELECT AVG(height_cm) * 0.8
    FROM superhero
);

WITH avg_height AS (
    SELECT AVG(height_cm) * 0.8 AS threshold
    FROM superhero
)
SELECT DISTINCT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
CROSS JOIN avg_height ah
WHERE s.height_cm > ah.threshold;

SELECT DISTINCT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE s.height_cm > (
    SELECT AVG(height_cm) * 0.8
    FROM superhero
);

WITH avg_height AS (
    SELECT AVG(height_cm) * 0.8 AS threshold
    FROM superhero
)
SELECT DISTINCT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
CROSS JOIN avg_height ah
WHERE s.height_cm > ah.threshold;

WITH threshold_calc AS (
    SELECT AVG(height_cm) * 0.8 AS threshold_height
    FROM superhero
)
SELECT DISTINCT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
JOIN threshold_calc tc ON s.height_cm > tc.threshold_height;

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE s.height_cm > (
    SELECT AVG(height_cm) * 0.8
    FROM superhero
);
